title: SpudCraft
description: A create based mod pack that is focused on progression via relics, structures, bosses, armor & tools and more! a curse forge port is planned.
body:
### Spudcraft is a kitchen sink vanilla + Pack
the main focus of this mod pack is to add onto the vanilla game by adding new ways to automate farms, make your world more alive with new structures and plenty of loot to find. Not every part of this pack is forgiving as there are the ocassional hordes of undead mobs that can infect you!

### Create-centered automation ecosystem
expanded with addons that let you build elaborate factories, trains that can be used for player & bulk item transportation, xp tanks & super enchanting setups from Create: Enchantment Industry, Jetpacks from Create: Stuff & Additions, contraptions for effortless resource production boosted further by Create: Structures Arise; which generates dynamic Create-themed structures throughout the overworld and nether, providing blocks, tools, and machines for a significant progression bump. The create mod and it's additions offer a very immersive farm/factory experience

### Exploration is transformed 
Yung’s Better series, Dungeons and Taverns, Relics & Artifacts deliver massive, loot-filled structures and richer biomes that reward adventure. A standout feature is the Artifacts and Relics systems, which introduce powerful, thematic accessory progression elements that encourage dungeon crawling and provide meaningful rewards with unique abilities and bonuses.
BEWARE OF MIMICS

### Terrain & Building Changes
Building and farming feel cozy and immersive thanks to Macaw’s decorative blocks, rechiseled variants, and expanded Farmer’s Delight cooking options. Multiplayer shines with proximity voice chat and server-friendly optimizations that reduce lag from large farms and entities. the terrain has been overhauled for a more cozy aesthetic appeal thanks to geophilic, regions unexplored and more. Thanks to Pro placer building has been made easier by allowing bedrock edition inspired bridging, click & hold quick placing and more. trowels also allow you to randomly place blocks from your hotbar!

### Performance first development
With the addition of some fabric mods via sinytra connector I've had to carefully optimize this pack both client and server sided to provide the smoothest possible experience. keep in mind this is my very first public modpack so i am still learning. the goal is to keep this modpack at or under 300 total mods (this includes all dependencies, basically any jar).

If you want vanilla Minecraft enhanced with satisfying automation, rewarding exploration, meaningful artifact progression, and beautiful visuals Spudcraft is the perfect choice.

### Credits:
Huge thanks to all mod authors and contributors for making this possible.

https://modrinth.com/user/simibubi Creator of the Create mod

https://modrinth.com/user/SSKirillSS the creator of Relics and its compat with Artifacts
